The '''spotted folk''' were a [[Kentra]] [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] with spotted [[Hair/Legends|fur]]. They inhabited the [[Orellon II|Orellan]] plains and relied on speed as a means of hunting and survival as they had to virtually race their prey. The spotted folk were essentially semi-nomadic with multiple dwellings in various locations of the savannas. They constituted the majority of Kentra farmers.<ref name="TP" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}
